title: Piano Concertos By Candlelight 21St Century Baroque Feat Candlelight Orchestra
description: SELLOUT EdFringe25 pianist Matthew Shiel performs J.S. Bach’s Piano Concerto No. 1 in D minor alongside English premiere of renowned Italian film composer Dr Alfredo Caponnetto’s brand new piano concerto with his Candlelight Orchestra. Bach’s D minor Concerto unleashes relentless drive and shadowed intensity whilst the thunderous rhythms and haunting lyricism of Caponetto’s new piano concerto pull you into worlds of fierce urgency and electrifying brilliance. Matthew Shiel is award-winning pianist who has collaborated with BBC Scottish Symphony Orchestra (broadcast on BBC Radio 3), The Band of His Majesty’s Royal Marine Band Scotland and has been broadcast on Al Jazeera. Matthew will conduct his acclaimed Candlelight Orchestra from the piano as Mozart and Bach did for an unforgettable evening of musical elegance.

venue.name: St Paul's Church
venue.address: St Pauls Church, West Street, East Sussex
